post.summary: Ingests order metrics for a specified date range and generates analytics data

parameters.name: relationType
parameters.description: Optional filter for specific relation types (Organization, Customer, SalesRepresentative). If not provided, processes all types.

parameters.name: graphType
parameters.description: Type of graph data to generate. Defaults to Quoted metrics.

requestBody.description: Request containing start and end date range for metric ingestion

get.summary: Get Order By PkId Or RefNoAndRevision

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Id should be GUID or string format {XXXXX.X}

parameters.name: includeGroupOption
parameters.description: [Optional] The flag if its need to include the group options.
